SpTU 4, 168 [Table of Solstices][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
oĀ 1oĀ 1

MU 44-KAM mar-taįø«-Å”aā-as-su LUGAL SIG 20 GUB ina MU.AN.NA 11 uā-mu x x

(o 1) In the 44th year (that) Artaxerxes was king the sun stood (at the solstice) in Simanu (month III). In (each) year [...] 11 days.

oĀ 22

1 :. 11 11 u 16 27 ina MU 45-KAM SIG 27 20 GUB

(o 2) 1 (times) 11. 11 and 16 (are) 27. In the 45th year the sun stood on 27 Simanu.

oĀ 33

2 :. 11 22 u 16 38 30 tu-maÅ”-Å”ar TAGā 8 Å U 8 20 GUB Å E

(o 3) 2 (times) 11. 22 and 16 (are) 38. You ignore 30. 8 remains. The sun stood on 8 DuŹ¾uzu (month IV). (Intercalary) Addaru (month XII).

oĀ 44

3 :. 11 33 u 16 49 30 tu-maÅ”-Å”ar TAGā 19 SIG 19 20 GUB

(o 4) 3 (times) 11. 33 and 16 (are) 49. You ignore 30. 19 remains. The sun stood on 19 Simanu.

oĀ 55

4 :. 11 44 u 16 1 30 tu-maÅ”-Å”ar TAGā 30 SIG 30 20 GUB

(o 5) 4 (times) 11. 44 and 16 (are) 1 00. You ignore 30. 30 remains. The sun stood on 30 Simanu.

oĀ 66

5 :. 11 55 u 16 1.11 1 tu-maÅ”-Å”ar TAGā 11 Å U āø¢11āø£ 20 āø¢GUBāø£ Å E

(o 6) 5 (times) 11. 55 and 16 (are) 1 11. You ignore 1 00. 11 remains. The sun stood on 11 DuŹ¾uzu. (Intercalary) Addaru.

6 :. 11 1.06 u 16 1.22 1 tu-maÅ”-Å”ar TAGā 22 [...]

(o 7) 6 (times) 11. 1 06 and 16 (are) 1 22. You ignore 1 00. 22 remains. [...].

7 :. 11 1.17 u 16 1.33 1.30 tu-maÅ”-Å”ar TAGā 3 [x x] 20 GUB Å E

(o 8) 7 (times) 11. 1 17 and 16 (are) 1 33. You ignore 1 30. 3 remains. The sun stood on [...]. (Intercalary) Addaru.

oĀ 99

(o 9) 8 [...]. 1 28 and 16 (are) 1 44. You ignore 1 30. [...] remains. The sun stood on 14 [...].

(o 10) [...] 1 39 and 16 (are) 1 55. You ignore 1 30. [...]. The sun stood on 15 Simanu.

(l.e. 1) [...]. 6 35 and 16 (are) [6] 41. You ignore 6 30. [...]. [...] stood on 11 DuŹ¾uzu. (Intercalary) Addaru is the same as (intercalary) Ululu (month VI).
